description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a slim, rectangular form factor and a metallic gray finish. The device features a large, black display screen bordered by a thin bezel, and a full-sized keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a function row and arrow keys. The touchpad is centrally located below the keyboard, and the palm rest area is spacious and unadorned. Multiple ports are visible along the left side, including USB and audio jacks, while ventilation grilles are present on the right side for cooling. The back of the device is plain, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a large black screen, full keyboard, and multiple side ports, designed with a minimalist and professional aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black screen, full keyboard, and centrally placed touchpad.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the keyboard, touchpad, and visible side ports including USB and audio jacks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain metallic back cover with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Right-angled view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and ventilation grilles on the side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and arrow keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
